'''fakuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabarettist|cabarettist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabarettist|cabarettist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fakuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækikith|fækikith]] || [[word:fækikij|fækikij]] || [[word:fækikish|fækikish]] || [[word:fækiki|fækiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakukukuth|fakukukuth]] || [[word:fakukukuj|fakukukuj]] || [[word:fakukukush|fakukukush]] || [[word:fakukuku|fakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakukuth|fakukuth]] || [[word:fakukuj|fakukuj]] || [[word:fakukush|fakukush]] || [[word:fakuku|fakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakufkuth|fakufkuth]] || [[word:fakufkuj|fakufkuj]] || [[word:fakufkush|fakufkush]] || [[word:fakufkuf|fakufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakukuthu|fakukuthu]] || [[word:fakukuju|fakukuju]] || [[word:fakukushu|fakukushu]] || [[word:fakukuku|fakukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakukuth|fakukuth]] || [[word:fakukuj|fakukuj]] || [[word:fakukush|fakukush]] || [[word:fakuku|fakuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakukuthul|fakukuthul]] || [[word:fakukujul|fakukujul]] || [[word:fakukushul|fakukushul]] || [[word:fakukukul|fakukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakukuthuthu|fakukuthuthu]] || [[word:fakukujuju|fakukujuju]] || [[word:fakukushushu|fakukushushu]] || [[word:fakukuku|fakukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakukuthun|fakukuthun]] || [[word:fakukujun|fakukujun]] || [[word:fakukushun|fakukushun]] || [[word:fakukukun|fakukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakukuthuoro|fakukuthuoro]] || [[word:fakukujuoro|fakukujuoro]] || [[word:fakukushuoro|fakukushuoro]] || [[word:fakukukuoro|fakukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
